scripts.build: esbuild tools/boxplot.tsx tools/scatter.tsx tools/aequorin.tsx tools/lineplot.tsx tools/venn.tsx tools/heatmap.tsx tools/molarity.tsx tools/power.tsx tools/upset.tsx --bundle --format=esm --outdir=tools --jsx=transform --minify-syntax --minify-whitespace --sourcemap
scripts.watch: esbuild tools/boxplot.tsx tools/scatter.tsx tools/aequorin.tsx tools/lineplot.tsx tools/venn.tsx tools/heatmap.tsx tools/molarity.tsx tools/power.tsx tools/upset.tsx --bundle --format=esm --outdir=tools --jsx=transform --minify-syntax --minify-whitespace --sourcemap --watch
scripts.test: node tests/shared.test.js && node tests/parsing.test.js && node tests/integration.test.js && node tests/components.test.js && node tests/power.test.js && node tests/stats.test.js && node tests/r-export.test.js && node tests/prefs.test.js && node tests/upset.test.js
